    PlacementController.projectFootprint(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Projects the cells a ship would occupy from head without touching the board model — used purely for preview/flash rendering.

    Method

    PlacementController.confirmPlacement(Coordinate targetHead)
     
    private void
    PlacementController.flashInvalid(Coordinate attemptedHead)
     
    private void
    GameController.handleHumanShot(Coordinate coordinate)
    Validates and applies a human shot at coordinate, under the same synchronized (gameSession) monitor that MachineTurnThread uses, so a click that sneaks in while the machine thread is about to wake up can never race it.
    private void
    GameController.onMachineShot(Coordinate coordinate, CellState result, boolean gameOver)
    Callback for MachineTurnThread, always invoked on the FX Application Thread.
    private List<Coordinate>
    PlacementController.projectFootprint(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Projects the cells a ship would occupy from head without touching the board model — used purely for preview/flash rendering.

    MachinePlayer.takeShot(Board targetBoard)

    Description
    boolean
    Board.canPlace(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Non-mutating check for whether a ship of the given type could be placed at the given head/orientation right now, without actually placing it.

    Board.projectCells(ShipType shipType, Coordinate head, Orientation orientation)
    Projects the list of coordinates a ship of the given type and orientation would occupy, starting from its head cell.
    CellState
    Board.receiveShot(Coordinate coordinate)
    Fires a shot at the given coordinate, updating the cell's state and, if applicable, the affected ship's hit registry.
    boolean
    Ship.registerHit(Coordinate coordinate)
    Registers a hit on the given coordinate.
    Method parameters in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with type arguments of type Coordinate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    Board.validatePlacement(List<Coordinate> projectedCells)
    Ensures none of the projected cells overlap an existing ship and that no projected cell is orthogonally or diagonally adjacent to an already-placed ship.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Cell(Coordinate coordinate)
    Creates a new, empty water cell at the given coordinate.

    RandomHuntStrategy.huntQueue

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private Coordinate
    RandomHuntStrategy.pickRandomUnshot(Board targetBoard)
    Collects every cell on the target board that has not been shot at, then returns one of them chosen uniformly at random.
    Coordinate
    IMachineShotStrategy.selectNextShot(Board targetBoard)
    Chooses the next coordinate to fire at, on the given target board.
    Coordinate
    RandomHuntStrategy.selectNextShot(Board targetBoard)
    Selects the next coordinate to fire at.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    RandomHuntStrategy.enqueueNeighbors(Coordinate center)
    Adds the orthogonal neighbors of center to the hunt queue.
    void
    IMachineShotStrategy.registerResult(Coordinate shotCoordinate, CellState result)
    Notifies the strategy of the outcome of its last shot, so it can update its internal targeting state (e.g.
    void
    RandomHuntStrategy.registerResult(Coordinate shotCoordinate, CellState result)
    Updates the hunt queue based on the outcome of the last shot.

    Field
    Description
    private final Map<Coordinate,javafx.scene.image.ImageView>
    BoardSpriteLayer.markerOverlays
    Maps a fired-upon coordinate to its marker ImageView, so it can be removed later.
    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board with parameters of type Coordinate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.addHitMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Places a hit marker sprite at the given coordinate.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.addMissMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Places a miss marker sprite at the given coordinate.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.addShipOverlay(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Places a live (non-sunk) ship sprite overlay at the ship's head coordinate.
    javafx.geometry.Point2D
    BoardGridView.getCellOrigin(Coordinate coordinate)
    Computes the top-left position of a cell's full logical square (ignoring the cosmetic inset), relative to the overlay layer.
    javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle
    BoardGridView.getCellRectangle(Coordinate coordinate)
     
    private void
    BoardSpriteLayer.positionAtCell(javafx.scene.image.ImageView view, Coordinate coordinate)
    Translates an ImageView so its top-left corner aligns with the logical cell origin in the overlay layer.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.removeMarker(Coordinate coordinate)
    Removes the marker overlay at the given coordinate, if one exists.
    void
    BoardGridView.resetCellHighlight(Coordinate coordinate)
    Resets a cell's highlight back to the default water look.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.revealSunkShip(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Replaces a ship's overlay with the sunk/revealed variant.
    void
    BoardGridView.setCellHighlight(Coordinate coordinate, boolean valid)
    Marks a cell as a valid or invalid placement target while the player is dragging a ship, by toggling a CSS class rather than setting an explicit fill, so the actual color stays defined in the stylesheet.
